---
title: "Using research to enhance the practice of suicide prevention"
date: 2023-05-25
author:
  - name: Thomas J. Hodges
    orcid: 0000-0002-5184-7346
type: "Presentation"
categories:
  - Health
  - Vocation
pub-info:
  links:
  - name: Let's Connect Summit 2023
    url: https://www.kennesaw.edu/research/centers-facilities/ames-center/lets-connect-summit/docs/lets-connect-summit-conference-program-final.pdf
    icon: fa-solid fa-circle-info
  - name: AMES Research Center
    url: https://www.kennesaw.edu/research/centers-facilities/ames-center/index.php
    icon: fa-solid fa-building-columns
toc: false
---

I moderated a panel discussion at the [Let's Connect Summit](https://www.kennesaw.edu/research/centers-facilities/ames-center/lets-connect-summit/docs/lets-connect-summit-conference-program-final.pdf) hosted by the [AMES Research Center](https://www.kennesaw.edu/research/centers-facilities/ames-center/index.php). The panel discussed ways to integrate research and practice in communities.
